title: centaurea thuillieri
intro: Centaurea thuillieri, also known as the Mountain Cornflower, is a flowering plant in the Asteraceae family, characterized by its bright blue or white blooms and feathery foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Centaurea thuillieri are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
